title: Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala
tagline: Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala, Kerala

overview.short: Pattumala Matha Church (Malayalam: പട്ടുമല മാതാ തീർത്ഥാടന കേന്ദ്രം, Tamil: பட்டுமலை மாதா புனித ஆலயம்) is a Roman Catholic Latin Rite pilgrim shrine in Kerala dedicated to Our Lady
overview.description: Pattumala Matha Church (Malayalam: പട്ടുമല മാതാ തീർത്ഥാടന കേന്ദ്രം, Tamil: பட்டுமலை மாதா புனித ஆலயம்) is a Roman Catholic Latin Rite pilgrim shrine in Kerala dedicated to Our Lady of Good Health. It is served by the Congregation of the Missionary Brothers of Saint Francis of Assisi (CMSF). This church has the largest dome among Christian churches in India.

topPlaces.name: Peermade
topPlaces.description: Peermade, also spelt Peerumedu is a village, Grama Panchayat and hill station in the state of Kerala, in southwestern India. It lies 915 metres (3,002 ft) above sea level in the Western Ghats (Sahyadri) about 85 kilometres (53 mi) east of Kottayam on the way to Kumily.

topPlaces.name: Peerumedu taluk
topPlaces.description: Peerumedu taluk is one of the 5 taluks in Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala. It consists of 10 revenue villages.

topPlaces.name: Panchalimedu
topPlaces.description: Panchalimedu is a hill station and view point near Kuttikkanam in Peerumedu tehsil of Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala. On the Makar Sankranti day, many Ayyappa devotees camps there to witness the sacred Makaravilakku (holy flame) that appears in the Ponnambalamedu near Sabarimala temple.

topPlaces.name: Parunthumpara
topPlaces.description: Parunthumpara is a village in the Indian state of Kerala's Idukki District. It is a small scenic location near Wagamon en route to Peerumedu.

topPlaces.name: Paloorkavu
topPlaces.description: Paloorkavu is a small village in Peruvanthanam panchayat of Peermade taluk in Idukki district, Kerala state, India. It consists of around 500 residences and one church (St.

topPlaces.name: Manjumala
topPlaces.description: Manjumala is a village in Idukki district in India's southwestern state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Vandiperiyar
topPlaces.description: Vandiperiyar, IPA: [ʋɐɳɖipːeɾijɐːr], is a spice village in Idukki district, in the Indian state of Kerala. It is known for tourism, tea and coffee plantations, black pepper and other spice products.

topPlaces.name: Valanjanganam Falls
topPlaces.description: Valanjanganam Falls, locally known as Valanjanganam Vellachaattam is a scenic waterfall located in Peermade in Idukki district, Kerala state. It lies on the National Highway 183 (Kottayam-Kumily Road), about 1 km from Murinjapuzha and 5 km from Kuttikkanam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (93 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Good Health Church, Pattumala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Peermade, Peerumedu taluk, Panchalimedu, Parunthumpara, Paloorkavu.
